translation.en: The flowers will bloom in spring.

exampleSentencesTranslated: This morning I saw the roses in the garden start to bloom.
When spring comes, many types of flowers will bloom everywhere.
She feels very happy every time she sees sunflowers bloom.

definitions.es: Abrirse o florecer, típicamente usado para flores.
definitions.vi: Mở ra hoặc nở, thường dùng cho hoa.
definitions.en: To open up or to bloom, typically used for flowers.

notes:
nở = to bloom, when a flower opens. It’s used for natural things opening or coming out.

Common with plants and nature: hoa nở, nụ nở, trứng nở (eggs hatch). It also extends to things spreading or opening up, like nở nụ cười (a smile blooming on someone’s face).

Related words: nở rộ = bloom massively/all at once; opposite for flowers is tàn (to wither).
exampleSentences: Sáng nay em thấy hoa hồng ngoài vườn bắt đầu nở.
Khi mùa xuân đến, rất nhiều loài hoa sẽ nở khắp nơi.
Chị cảm thấy rất vui mỗi lần nhìn hoa hướng dương nở.

translation.en: The flowers will bloom in spring.

notes_md:
**nở** = to bloom, when a flower opens. It’s used for natural things opening or coming out.

Common with plants and nature: **hoa nở, nụ nở, trứng nở** (eggs hatch). It also extends to things spreading or opening up, like **nở nụ cười** (a smile blooming on someone’s face).


Related words: **nở rộ** = bloom massively/all at once; opposite for flowers is **tàn** (to wither).
